title: About Altria
note: Identifies Altria's operating companies and major brands, including Marlboro, on!, and NJOY.

title: Altria Group 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K
note: Primary source for Altria's business segments, financial performance, tobacco volume pressure, litigation and regulatory risk, and smoke-free strategy.

title: Altria Group (MO) Market Capitalization
note: Market-cap reference URL supplied by the manifest and used for public-company ranking context.

title: Altria Group (MO) Stock Price and Overview
note: Used for current market capitalization and valuation ratio review near the publication date.

title: Altria Reports 2024 Second-Quarter and First-Half Results
note: Documents FDA marketing authorization developments for smoke-free products and PMTA activity for on! oral nicotine pouches.

title: FDA Authorizes Marketing of NJOY Menthol-Flavored E-Cigarette Products
note: Shows the regulatory gatekeeping environment for nicotine alternatives and smoke-free product authorization.

title: QuitGuide App
note: Free smoking-cessation tool used as a practical demand-reduction alternative to cigarettes.

title: quitSTART App
note: Free quit-support app used as a practical alternative pathway for users trying to reduce or exit nicotine use.

title: Open Source Ecology
note: Reference point for open, distributed production tooling relevant to speculative cooperative plant-processing concepts.

title: OpenWeedLocator Project
note: Open-source agricultural hardware example showing how farm tooling can be community-built and locally adapted.
